title: scene.duplicateObject response result
description: Graceful acknowledgement of a scene.duplicateObject request. accepted reports whether the engine performed the duplication. newId, when present, is the opaque id the engine assigned to the copied object; it is a generic string handle, never a live-memory reference or engine pointer.

accepted.description: Whether the engine accepted and performed the object duplication.

newId.description: Optional opaque id the engine assigned to the duplicated object.
